Incompetent Person In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2003 Text Ruling

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim
Off Calendar Oct-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of Incompetent Person hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez
Appearances:
Stephen Cornet, Esq. for Petitioner: George Arthur Antoniotti present as guardian ad litem with and for Alfredo Antoniotti, Claimant, was sworn and examined. Mary Virginia Rowland also present.
David Delbon, Esq., appeared for defendants.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court approves the $100,000.00 settlement, with the proceeds ordered held in special trust by plaintiff's counsel, Mr. Cornet, until issues concerning establishing a special needs trust are resolved.
Counsel will reschedule the hearing.
